description: Immutable NZ scopes for RuleSpec-NZ: the 2026-06-16 PCO statute and regulation scopes, the 2026-07-18 Wellington district-plan scope, and the 2026-07-19 PCO supplement scopes carried unchanged, plus the first nz/guidance scope (2026-07-20: IRD KiwiSaver contribution/government-contribution guidance and Employment NZ parental-leave payment guidance and rate notices).
name: nz-rulespec-2026-07-20
